title: BundleSession
description: Per-session orchestrator state living inside a portable bundle at state/sessions/<id>/session.json. Per resolved Q #8 the version field is named schema_version (matching the pointer file). The length caps that lived on next_action and subagent_results[].summary in the v1 schema were removed: in practice the orchestrator writes multi-paragraph handoff text and 2-4 paragraph subagent summaries, and capping those at 300/1000 characters caused the live bundle to fail validation. subagent_results items also declare two optional fields the orchestrator uses (`task`: free-text label for the run, `agentId`: SendMessage continuation handle) — they are typed explicitly rather than waved through with additionalProperties: true, so the schema still documents the full payload shape.

next_action.description: Multi-paragraph description of the next step on resume. Intentionally uncapped — see schema description.

summary.description: Multi-paragraph subagent return summary. Intentionally uncapped — see schema description.

task.description: Optional free-text label naming the run this subagent did (e.g. 'TASK-004 phase 3a implementation').

agentId.description: Optional SendMessage continuation handle for re-spawning the same subagent in a later turn.
